# Fix 21.1.4 — correctifs vs 21.1.3

> Correctifs livrés par le patch `21.1.4` (publié le 2026-04-03). La documentation de cette skill (`references/`) reflète le **dernier** patch de la mineure : si votre projet est sur un patch **antérieur** à `21.1.4`, les correctifs ci-dessous ne sont **pas** dans votre version.
> Storybook exact de ce patch : https://lucca-front.lucca.io/v21.1.4/storybook

## API (diff structurel)

### bubble-icon

~ `size` : 'S' | 'L' | '' → 'S' | 'M' | 'L', défaut '' → 'M'
~ `bubbleDirection` : 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right' | null → 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right' | 'random', défaut null → 'random'

### bubble-illustration

~ `size` : 'S' | 'L' | '' → 'S' | 'M' | 'L', défaut '' → 'M'

### callout

`CalloutComponent` :
  + `hx` : unknown

### callout-popover

+ `popoverTrigger` : 'click' | 'click+hover' | 'hover+focus'

### software-icon

~ `icon` : // Time and Activities
	'absences' | 'timesheet' | 'office' | 'projects' | 'shifts' | // Talent Management
	'performance' | 'engagement' | 'training' | 'recruitment' | 'mood' | // Employee Administration
	'analytics' | 'employee-administration' | 'shared-documents' | 'faces' | // Spend Management
	'business-expenses' | 'invoices' | 'payment-methods' | 'accounting-assistant' | // Compensation and Benefits
	'compensation' | 'payslip' | 'benefits' | 'payroll-assistant' | // Lucca

	'administration' | 'cloud-control' | 'lucca' → // Time and Activities
	'absences' | 'timesheet' | 'office' | 'projects' | 'shifts' | // Talent Management
	'performance' | 'engagement' | 'training' | 'recruitment' | 'mood' | // Employee Administration
	'analytics' | 'employee-administration' | 'shared-documents' | 'faces' | // Spend Management
	'business-expenses' | 'invoices' | 'payment-methods' | 'accounting-assistant' | 'certified-einvoicing-platform' | // Compensation and Benefits
	'compensation' | 'payslip' | 'benefits' | 'payroll-assistant' | // Lucca

	'administration' | 'cloud-control' | 'lucca'


## Types partagés

### LuccaIcon

+ `bubbleSpeechStrikethrough`
+ `deviceTablet`
+ `signRating`

+<table class="demo-QAtable">
+	<tbody>
+		<tr>
+			<td style="width: 8rem"></td>
+			<td>
+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list">HTML</div>

+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list">
+					<div class="fileEntryDisplayWrapper">
+						<dl class="fileEntry">
+							<dt class="fileEntry-filename">
+								<div class="fileEntry-filename-tooltip">dummyimage.png</div>
+							</dt>
+							<dd class="fileEntry-description">
+								<span class="fileEntry-description-format">PNG file</span>
+								<span class="pr-u-mask"> – </span>
+								<div class="divider mod-vertical fileEntry-description-divider"></div>
+								<span class="fileEntry-description-size">80MB</span>
+							</dd>
+							<dd class="fileEntry-status">
+								<div class="fileEntry-status-content">
+									<div class="fileEntry-status-content-inside">
+										<img alt="" loading="lazy" class="fileEntry-status-content-inside-img" src="https://dummyimage.com/500" />
+									</div>
+								</div>
+							</dd>
+							<dd class="fileEntry-toolbar">
+								<div class="fileToolbar mod-disablePositioning">
+									<ul class="fileToolbar-list">
+										<li class="fileToolbar-list-item">
+											<button type="button" class="button fileToolbar-list-item-button mod-onlyIcon mod-iconOnLeft mod-iconOnRight">
+												<span aria-hidden="true" class="lucca-icon icon-trashDelete fileToolbar-list-item-button-icon"></span>
+												<span class="pr-u-mask">Delete file "dummyimage.png"</span>
+											</button>
+										</li>
+									</ul>
+								</div>
+							</dd>
+						</dl>
+						<dl class="fileEntry is-loading">
+							<dt class="fileEntry-filename">
+								<div class="fileEntry-filename-tooltip">dummyimage.png</div>
+							</dt>
+							<dd class="fileEntry-description">
+								<span class="fileEntry-description-format">PNG file</span>
+								<span class="pr-u-mask"> – </span>
+								<div class="divider mod-vertical fileEntry-description-divider"></div>
+								<span class="fileEntry-description-size">80MB</span>
+							</dd>
+							<dd class="fileEntry-status">
+								<div class="fileEntry-status-content">
+									<div class="fileEntry-status-content-inside">
+										<div class="fileEntry-status-content-inside-loading loading"></div>
+									</div>
+								</div>
+							</dd>
+							<dd class="fileEntry-toolbar">
+								<div class="fileToolbar mod-disablePositioning">
+									<ul class="fileToolbar-list">
+										<li class="fileToolbar-list-item">
+											<button type="button" class="button fileToolbar-list-item-button mod-onlyIcon mod-iconOnLeft mod-iconOnRight">
+												<span aria-hidden="true" class="lucca-icon icon-trashDelete fileToolbar-list-item-button-icon"></span>
+												<span class="pr-u-mask">Delete file "dummyimage.png"</span>
+											</button>
+										</li>

+								</div>
+							</dd>

+									<div class="fileEntry-status-content-inside">

new file mode 100644
index 000000000..49d192a07
--- /dev/null
+++ b/stories/qa/file-entry/file-entry.stories.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component } from '@angular/core';
+import { FileEntryComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/file-upload';
+import { Meta, StoryObj, moduleMetadata } from '@storybook/angular';
+
+@Component({
+	selector: 'file-entry-stories',
+	templateUrl: './file-entry.stories.html',
+	imports: [FileEntryComponent],
+	changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush,
+	styles: [
+		`
+			:host ::ng-deep .fileEntryDisplayWrapper {
+				inline-size: 100%;
+			}
+			.demo-QAtable {
+				width: 100%;
+				table-layout: fixed;
+			}
+		`,
+	],
+})
+class FileEntryStory {}
+
+export default {
+	title: 'QA/FileEntry',
+	component: FileEntryStory,
+	decorators: [
+		moduleMetadata({
+			entryComponents: [FileEntryStory],
+		}),
+	],
+} as Meta;
+
+const template = () => ({});
+
+export const Basic: StoryObj<FileEntryStory> = {
+	args: {},
+	render: template,
+};

+							<span class="fileUpload-instruction-size">Maximum size: 80MB. </span
+							><span class="pr-u-mask">The submitted file is detailed below. </span>
+						</div>
+						<span aria-hidden="true" class="fileUpload-button button">Select a file</span>
+					</div>
+				</div>

+import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component } from '@angular/core';
+import { MultiFileUploadComponent, SingleFileUploadComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/file-upload';
+import { LuSafeExternalSvgPipe } from '@lucca-front/ng/safe-content';
+import { Meta, StoryObj, moduleMetadata } from '@storybook/angular';
+
+@Component({
+	selector: 'file-upload-stories',
+	templateUrl: './file-upload.stories.html',
+	imports: [SingleFileUploadComponent, MultiFileUploadComponent, LuSafeExternalSvgPipe],
+	changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush,
+	styles: [
+		`
+			:host ::ng-deep .fileUpload,
+			lu-single-file-upload,
+			lu-multi-file-upload {
+				inline-size: 100%;
+			}
+			.demo-QAtable {
+				width: 100%;
+				table-layout: fixed;
+			}
+		`,
+	],
+})
+class FileUploadStory {}
+
+export default {
+	title: 'QA/FileUpload',
+	component: FileUploadStory,
+	decorators: [
+		moduleMetadata({
+			entryComponents: [FileUploadStory],
+		}),
+	],
+} as Meta;
+
+const template = () => ({});
+
+export const Basic: StoryObj<FileUploadStory> = {
+	args: {},
+	render: template,
+};
